name: Management Team
text: Zain completely transformed our digital workflow. The 3D Van Configurator he built is a masterpiece—giving our customers real-time rendering with smooth camera controls. On top of that, his custom ClickUp API integration completely eliminated our manual time-logging errors.

name: Project Director
text: Zain is an exceptional developer who bridges the gap between high-performance frontend and robust full-stack logic. From architecture-heavy platforms like wedX.com with its dual dashboards, to the interactive 3D component rendering for our CNC machining platform, his execution was flawless.

name: Clinical Operations Head
text: We needed to move away from a messy, manual Google Sheets workflow for patient histories, and Zain delivered exactly what we needed. The custom hospital management system he engineered is secure, fast, and has made our daily operations 100% digital.
